parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Specifies the texture type to create.

parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When set to 1, the Texture 3D will fill up it cache with images. The texture3D replaces a slice of its 3d data with its input every frame. When it has filled up all of its slices it wraps around and s

parameters.name: replacesingle
parameters.label: Replace Single
parameters.description: While this is set > 0, the Texture 3D will replace the slice at 'Replace Index' with the input image. This allows you to replace specific slices of the 3D texture at will.

parameters.name: replacesinglepulse
parameters.label: Replace Single Pulse
parameters.description: Replace an image for the single frame this was pulsed.

parameters.name: replaceindex
parameters.label: Replace Index
parameters.description: Select the slice index that will be replaced by the input, when 'Replace Single' is turned on.

parameters.name: prefill
parameters.label: Pre Fill
parameters.description: This feature is used to pre-setup all of the slices of the 3D texture in a single cook. When set to 1, it will fill the cache. If set to 1 during playback, it will fill immediately. If set to 1 and sa

parameters.name: prefillpulse
parameters.label: Pre Fill Pulse
parameters.description: Pre-fills a single image during the frame this was pulsed.

parameters.name: cachesize
parameters.label: Cache Size
parameters.description: The number of images the Texture 3D will hold. This is the number of 3D slices in the texture.

parameters.name: step
parameters.label: Step Size
parameters.description: This parameter sets how many frames pass before the grabs one into cache. A Sample Step of 1 will grab each consecutive frame, a Sample Step of 2 will grab every other frame, and so on.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: When set to 1, the cache is flushed and the is reset.
